title: ToolCallAuditRecord
description: Immutable per-call evidence artifact for KOSMOS tool invocations. Schema version v1. See specs/024-tool-security-v1/data-model.md § 3.

adapter_mode.description: The only permitted shape-differing field between mock and live records.

caller_identity.description: Opaque identity token. MUST NOT be a Korean resident registration number.

permission_decision.description: Deny variants are first-class; rejected calls retain evidentiary parity with successful calls.

auth_level_presented.description: The AAL the caller proved at call time (NIST SP 800-63-4).

pipa_class.description: PIPA classification of THIS call's payload (not the adapter default).

dpa_reference.description: DPA template identifier; non-null whenever pipa_class != 'non_personal'.

input_hash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the canonicalized input payload.

output_hash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the raw output payload.

sanitized_output_hash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the sanitized output, when sanitization ran.

merkle_covered_hash.description: Declares which hash the Merkle leaf binds. MUST be 'sanitized_output_hash' iff sanitized_output_hash is non-null.

merkle_leaf_id.description: Leaf identifier in the external Merkle chain; chain construction is deferred.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 with timezone. Naïve timestamps are rejected.

cost_tokens.description: LLM token cost if applicable; 0 for pure-tool calls.

rate_limit_bucket.description: Bucket identifier for per-provider/per-key quota accounting.

public_path_marker.description: True only for check_eligibility AAL1 rules-only evaluations.

allOf.description: I1: sanitized_output_hash non-null iff merkle_covered_hash binds it.
I2: public_path_marker implies check_eligibility + AAL1 + non_personal.
I3: pipa_class != non_personal implies dpa_reference is non-null.
